scripts.dev: NODE_ENV=development DEBUG=langwatch:* DEBUG_HIDE_DATE=true DEBUG_COLORS=true concurrently 'node server.js' 'npm run start:workers'
scripts.build: export DEPENDENCY_INJECTION_DIR=$(pwd)/src/injection/; export EXTRA_INCLUDE=$(pwd)/src; cp .env langwatch/langwatch/; cd langwatch/langwatch; npm run build
scripts.start:prepare: git submodule update --init; cp .env langwatch/langwatch/; cd langwatch/langwatch; npm install && npm run copy:integration && npm run types:zod:generate; cd ../../; npm run prisma:db:push
scripts.prisma:db:push: node prisma/generate-schema.js && npx prisma db push && cp -R node_modules/.prisma/* langwatch/langwatch/node_modules/.prisma/
